hero_text: Your Google Sheets, as a translation backend
hero_tagline: Fetch, sync and auto-translate — with full TypeScript safety and zero configuration overhead.
feature1_detail: Push new translation keys from your local files straight back into the shared spreadsheet. Collaborators see your keys immediately — no manual copy-paste.
feature2_detail: Have a public spreadsheet? Pass spreadsheetId + publicSheet true and you are done — no service account, no API key, no invite by email. The link is enough.
feature3_detail: Missing a German translation? Enable autoTranslate and the package injects GOOGLETRANSLATE formulas automatically. Translators start from a draft, not a blank cell.
feature4_detail: The generated locales.ts only contains locales that carry actual content. Empty columns and config-only sheets are silently ignored.
feature5_detail: Strict TypeScript throughout. Path-traversal-safe file writes, runtime type-guards on JSON, and ESLint clean with @typescript-eslint/recommended.
feature6_detail: Drop one import into instrumentation.ts and your translations are prefetched during next build — perfect for static export workflows.
feature7_detail: Sensible defaults for every option. Set three environment variables and call getSpreadSheetData(). That is it.
